agentSupport.notes: Fast/full classifier leaf for the APS loop (module 12, design changes #3/#5, gap G4): a task is fast only if all hold (<=3 files, no interface/schema/API change, no new deps, no security-sensitive paths, established approach, no cross-module deps), gated by a dependency fan-out scan; fast cuts content (design/review/worktree) but never authority (Ready membrane, merge) or the safety rails; any doubt -> full; hygiene-class items are scope-exempt. Design: plans/designs/2026-06-18-canonical-aps-loop.design.md.
